info.title: openJII API
info.description: REST API documentation for the openJII platform

organizationId.description: Optional owning organization; defaults to the creator's personal org

embargoUntil.description: Embargo end date and time (ISO datetime string, will be stored as UTC in database)

members.description: Optional array of member objects with userId and role

locations.description: Optional array of locations associated with the experiment

workbookId.description: Optional workbook ID to associate with the experiment

schema.description: Filter experiments by relationship to the user

embargoUntil.description: Updated embargo end date and time (ISO datetime string, will be stored as UTC in database)

anonymizeContributors.description: When true, the API rewrites contributor name/avatar/id to deterministic pseudonyms before responding

locations.description: Updated locations associated with the experiment

identifier.description: Stable identifier: static table name, macro UUID, or upload table name

tableType.description: Whether this is a static table, a macro table, or a user-uploaded table

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the table for UI

totalRows.description: Total number of rows in the table

defaultSortColumn.description: Default column to sort by in the UI

errorColumn.description: Column name that contains error information if any

schema.description: Table name: 'raw_data', 'device', macro UUID, or upload_table_id
Specific columns to fetch. If provided with tableName, fetches full data for these columns only
Column name to order results by
JSON-encoded array of filter conditions applied as a WHERE clause
Hard cap on returned rows for filtered/aggregated reads. Ignored when page/pageSize are used.

name.description: Technical name of the table used for queries and operations

schema.description: Column whose distinct values to return
Hard cap on returned values (default 200, max 1000).

truncated.description: True when the column has more values than `limit` returned

tableName.description: Name of the table to export

anonymizeContributors.description: Per-export override of the experiment's anonymise-contributors setting. Falls back to the experiment's stored value when omitted.

userId.description: ID of the user to add as a member

role.description: ExperimentRole to assign to the new member
New role to assign to the member

experimentId.description: Experiment to transfer admin rights on

targetUserId.description: User to make an admin of the experiment

message.description: Optional short message to the project admins

accessKeyId.description: AWS Access Key ID for temporary credentials

secretAccessKey.description: AWS Secret Access Key for temporary credentials

sessionToken.description: AWS Session Token for temporary credentials

expiration.description: ISO 8601 date string when credentials expire

experimentId.description: UUID of the experiment to associate this upload with

uploadUrl.description: Pre-signed S3 PutObject URL (valid for 15 minutes)

key.description: S3 object key where the payload will be stored

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 date string when the upload URL expires

serialNumber.description: Physical device identifier, e.g. MAC address

deviceType.description: IotDevice class, maps to the ingest topic sensorType

email.description: Email address to subscribe to the newsletter

schema.description: Search query for name or email
Maximum number of users to return
Number of users to skip for pagination

activated.description: Whether the profile is active or deactivated

avatarUrl.description: Avatar URL seeded from OAuth provider

role.description: New role to assign to the invitation

lastSeenAt.description: ISO timestamp the user last opened the What's new panel; null = never seen
ISO timestamp the user last opened the What's new panel; null = never seen
